name: Alex Rivera
comment: Absolutely love this tool! The architecture breakdown helped me understand a complex microservices repo in minutes instead of hours.

name: Jordan Smith
comment: RepoRadar is now part of my daily workflow. I use it to evaluate open source libraries before adding them to our projects.

name: Taylor Chen
comment: Great tool overall. Would love to see support for private repositories in the future.

name: Morgan Lee
comment: The setup instructions generated by RepoRadar are incredibly helpful for onboarding new team members.

name: Casey Brown
comment: Very useful for quick code reviews. The performance insights have helped us identify bottlenecks.

name: Riley Park
comment: As an open source maintainer, this helps me understand contributor PRs faster.
